  'evoArcadmin_TEST_1999-0094-0-425-00-1-AYRILSAK_DA_BERABERIZ.mp4',
  'evoArcadmin_OZETLI_2021-0016-0-0109-90-1-TESKILAT.mp4',

  'web_client_cagatay_tester h264_1985-0151-0-0002-00-1-AMANDA.mp4'
\)
foreach \(\\$f in \\$files\) {

}
" 2>/dev/null)
